source: Johns Hopkins Atlas of Surgical Neuropathology
copyrightStatus: Johns Hopkins app images are copyrighted app content and are not extracted or copied into this project without a licensed export or written permission.

localMetadataImport.imageBinaryPolicy: Image files remain in the licensed app bundle and are not copied into this project by the metadata import.

deconstructedLearningModel: Searchable diagnostic image atlas organized by entity.
Interactive diffuse glioma algorithm integrating histology and molecular data.

implementationMapping.projectElement: Local reference-library-backed sign-out case images with source attribution.
Image-first diagnostic sequence with stepwise reveal and report drafting.
Required report elements, pitfalls, and ancillary decision targets.
Integrated diagnosis cases requiring IDH, ATRX, p53, 1p/19q, MGMT, and molecular-status language.

acceptedInputs: A user-provided folder of images licensed for local educational reuse.
A CSV or JSON manifest mapping image filenames to diagnosis, stain, caption, and source/license.
Open-license image URLs or PDFs where local capture is permitted by license.
blockedInputs: Paid-app image assets copied without permission.
Images without reuse rights or source attribution.
